summary: Completed testing of admin panel high-priority features: SEO Management, Events with Gallery Images, and Founder Settings. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed: Admin login, SEO tab with 17 complete settings, Events CRUD with gallery images section, Founder Settings with all form fields.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with correct password returns success + token
Backend: Admin login with wrong password returns success=false
Backend: GET /api/seo returns all SEO settings (list)
Backend: POST /api/seo creates SEO settings
Backend: GET /api/seo/{page_slug} returns specific SEO settings
Backend: POST /api/seo updates existing SEO settings (upsert)
Backend: SEO settings have correct structure (id, page_slug, meta_title, meta_description, updated_at)
Backend: POST /api/events creates event with gallery_images array
Backend: Event without gallery_images defaults to empty array
Backend: GET /api/events returns gallery_images field
Backend: PUT /api/events/{id} updates gallery_images
Backend: DELETE /api/events/{id} removes event
Backend: GET /api/founder-settings returns settings with correct structure
Backend: PUT /api/founder-settings updates founder settings
Backend: Founder settings persist after update
Backend: Founder settings support partial update
Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Backend: GET /api/ root endpoint works
Frontend: Admin login page loads with password input and Login button
Frontend: Admin login with password 'etieducom@admin2025' succeeds
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads with all tabs (Events, SEO, Founder, etc.)
Frontend: SEO tab shows SEO Management with status overview (17 Complete, 0 Incomplete, 0 Missing)
Frontend: SEO tab has search functionality
Frontend: Clicking SEO page card opens edit modal
Frontend: SEO edit modal has all fields (meta_title, meta_description, meta_keywords, og_title, og_description, og_image)
Frontend: Saving SEO settings shows success toast
Frontend: Events tab shows Events Management with Add Event button
Frontend: Add Event modal has all fields (title, date, time, location, description, image_url)
Frontend: Add Event modal has Gallery Images section with input and + button
Frontend: Creating event shows success toast
Frontend: Event card shows Edit and Delete buttons
Frontend: Founder tab shows Founder Settings form
Frontend: Founder form has all fields (name, title, image_url, message, vision, linkedin, twitter)
Frontend: Founder preview card shows current values
Frontend: Saving founder settings shows success toast
critical_code_review_comments: SEOManager component correctly displays all 17 page SEO settings with status indicators (complete/incomplete/missing)
EventsManager component has gallery_images section with add/remove functionality
FounderManager component correctly fetches, displays, and updates founder settings
All form fields have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Success/error toasts provide good user feedback
seed_data_creation: Created test event (deleted after test), updated founder settings, created/updated test SEO settings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel features tested: 1) SEO Management tab - shows 17 SEO settings with status (complete/incomplete/missing), search, click to edit in modal, save. 2) Events Management - Add/Edit/Delete events with gallery_images array support, gallery section in modal with add/remove. 3) Founder Settings tab - form with name, title, image_url, message, vision, linkedin, twitter fields, preview card shows current values. All APIs working correctly.

admin_login: Login with correct password shows dashboard
seo_management: SEO tab shows 18 SEO settings count
Modal has all SEO fields with character counts
events_management: Event form has all required fields
Gallery Images section with URL input
founder_settings: Form with Name, Title, Image URL, Message, Vision, LinkedIn, Twitter
Preview card shows current founder info
